---
title: "Some risks and opportunities of automated data analysis"
date: 2024-06-25
description: "Some thoughts arising from our TMCF 2024 workshop at the Alan Turing Institute."
title-block-banner: "#32251f"


categories:
  - AI
  - automated analysis
  - integrative modelling

format:
  html:
    shift-heading-level-by: 1
---

```{=html}
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=https://theory4ida.github.io/tmcf/posts/01-models/">
<script>
  window.location.replace("https://theory4ida.github.io/tmcf/posts/01-models/");
</script>
<p>Redirecting to the TMCF post. If you are not redirected, <a href="https://theory4ida.github.io/tmcf/posts/01-models/">click here</a>.</p>
```
